author: hi0b
content: Result: workspace conversion complete and crossbridge-protocol crate implemented per .design/protocol.md. Workspace members: '.' (existing crossbridge v1 binary, unchanged in behaviour) and 'crossbridge-protocol' (new). Protocol crate provides: all 10 spec'd message types (Register, RegisterResponse, Notification, SupervisorMessage, ClientRequest, SubmitIssue, SubmitAnswer, AnswerComment, Attachment, ServerResponse) with serde+postcard; sync framing (write_message_sync/read_message_sync over std::io); async framing (write_message/read_message over tokio AsyncRead/AsyncWrite, gated behind 'async' feature, default-on); ProtocolError enum (Io / Serialize / FrameTooLarge); MAX_FRAME_SIZE = 16 MiB enforced before payload allocation. Tests: 13 sync roundtrip + framing-edge cases, 4 async + sync↔async interop. cargo test --workspace: 25 passed / 0 failed. cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings: clean. cargo fmt --check: clean. cargo build/test --no-default-features for crossbridge-protocol: clean (validates the future client crate's tokio-free dependency surface).
